report_summary:
**DONE: AGRO CHINA PAKISTAN PVT LTD, PK — Risk: 3 MONITOR — Active growing China importer (265 customs records, 60 Chinese suppliers, +577% growth 2021-2024); Topsun Group Pakistan parent; no sanctions/adverse media; DR. Usman Ali PEP status unverified; dual-use agrochemical screening required**

---

## 📋 Counterparty Research: AGRO CHINA PAKISTAN PVT LTD
`~/crawl/output/agro_china_pakistan_pvt_ltd_PK_20260428.json` → uploaded to `stcrawlosint/osint-staging/americas/`

---

### ⚠️ Critical Parameter Flag
**ENTITY_COUNTRY: "PA"** (Panama) in the request — **corrected to PK (Pakistan)**. All evidence confirms a Pakistani entity: NTN 4334750-9, Lahore addresses, topsungroup.pk website, Chinese customs records showing Pakistan-based importer.

### 🌍 Key Risk Factors (MONITOR score 3)

| Factor | Detail |
|---|---|
| **Pakistan jurisdiction** | Elevated AML/CFT risk; corruption ~133/180 TI CPI; limited UBO transparency |
| **Agrochemical + China imports** | Potential dual-use precursors; 60 Chinese suppliers; DPP registrations unverified |
| **DR. Usman Ali PEP unknown** | "DR." prefix — could be government medical officer or public university professor; requires CNIC verification |
| **SECP data inaccessible** | Directors' CNICs, share structure, incorporation date not confirmed |
| **BIS search incomplete** | Pakistan has proliferation-listed entities; formal BIS check required |

### 🎯 8 EDD Actions Required

|---|---|

| 🔴 HIGH | Verify DR. Usman Ali CNIC + position (PEP screen) |
| 🔴 HIGH | Product HS codes + DPP registration list (dual-use screen) |
| 🔴 HIGH | BIS Entity List formal search (bis.gov) |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | Top 10 Chinese suppliers list (screen against China entity lists) |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | Urdu-language adverse media (Dawn, Geo, Jang, Express Tribune) |
| 🟡 MEDIUM | FBR NTN certificate + SECP annual returns |
